name: Park Cities Surgery Center
services: orthopedic surgery, gastroenterology, gynecology, plastic surgery, ENT, pain management, podiatry, urology, colorectal surgery
anesthesia_quote: The anesthesia provider will also speak with you in the pre-operative area to review all pre-operative information and discuss your anesthesia.
evidence: The facility website explicitly states 'The Joint Commission accredits our facility.' No evidence of AAAHC or QUAD A accreditation found on website or directories.
notes: Multi-specialty ASC. Offers Direct Screen Colonoscopy Program.

name: Ophthalmology Surgery Center of Dallas
services: ophthalmology, cornea, glaucoma, oculoplastic surgery, retina, vitreous surgery, pediatric ophthalmology
anesthesia_quote: Questions regarding your individual treatment plan or charges rendered by your surgeon, anesthesia team or other independent providers should be directed to their offices.
evidence: The facility website explicitly states accreditation by the Accreditation Association for Ambulatory Health Care (AAAHC). No evidence found for Joint Commission or QUAD A accreditation.
notes: Joint venture with Texas Health Resources and physician investors. Located on 4th floor of Eye Institute of Texas.

name: Baylor Scott & White Ambulatory Endoscopy Center
anesthesia_quote: We have nothing but the most amazing and caring doctors, nurses and anesthesiologists working together to provide the absolute best care for our patients every single day.
evidence: Facility website explicitly states accreditation by AAAHC and CMS certification. No evidence found for Joint Commission or QUAD A accreditation in website content or search results.
notes: Licensed by State of Texas. Accredited by AAAHC, certified by CMS, and accredited by ASGE. Owned in part by physicians.

name: Dallas Day Surgery Center
anesthesia_quote: Darlene (CRNA), Dr. Hobar, Robin Hobar (Dr. Hobar's Wife), Dawna (Office Manager), & Sandra (CST).
evidence: The facility website explicitly states it is 'Fully accredited by the American Association For Accreditation of Ambulatory Surgery Facilities, Inc. (AAAASF)' which is QUAD A. No evidence found for AAAHC or Joint Commission accreditation.
notes: Located at Dallas Plastic Surgery Institute. Member of Texas Association of Surgery Centers and Ambulatory Surgery Center Association.

name: North PKWY Surgical Institute
services: minimally invasive spine surgery, bariatric surgery, pain management, plastic surgery
anesthesia_quote: You will need to arrange for a friend or family member to accompany you and provide transportation if your procedure involves anesthesia or sedatives.
evidence: The facility's website explicitly states it is an AAAHC accredited outpatient facility on multiple service pages. No evidence found for Joint Commission or QUAD A accreditation.
notes: Outpatient ambulatory surgery center in Dallas area.

name: Medical City Surgery Center Park Central
services: orthopedic surgery, dental surgery, otolaryngologic surgery, endoscopic surgery, OB/GYN surgery, ophthalmologic surgery
evidence: Medical City Surgery Center Park Central has been accredited by the Accreditation Association for Ambulatory Health Care (AAAHC) according to both their official website and third-party sources.
notes: Medicare certified ASC with 6 operating rooms. Certified by CMS.

name: Dallas Plastic Surgery Institute - Dallas Day Surgery Center
anesthesia_quote: using only highly experienced, board certified anesthesiologists with decades of expertise
evidence: Dr. Hobar's page confirms Dallas Day Surgery Center is fully accredited by AAAASF (QUAD A). No AAAHC or Joint Commission accreditation found.
notes: Modern private ambulatory surgical facility within Dallas Plastic Surgery Institute. Specializes in unique needs of plastic surgery patients.

name: Texas Health Surgery Center Dallas
anesthesia_quote: Anesthesia may be provided by a combination of board certified physicians and certified registered nurse anesthetists (CRNA).
evidence: Facility website explicitly states accreditation by AAAHC. No evidence found for Joint Commission or QUAD A accreditation in website content or search results.
notes: Ranked #17 in Texas on Newsweek's 2025 list of America's Best Ambulatory Surgery Centers. Majority owned by Texas Health, managed by Surgical Care Affiliates.

name: Medical City Ambulatory Surgery Center Dallas
evidence: The facility website explicitly states 'The Center is licensed by the State of Texas, the federal Medicare program, and accredited by AAAHC.' No mention of Joint Commission or QUAD A accreditation found.
notes: Located on campus of Medical City Dallas Hospital. Licensed by State of Texas and accredited by AAAHC.

name: Dallas Endoscopy Center
anesthesia_quote: Yet even before I was awake from the anesthesia, someone was trying to get me dressed and out the door
evidence: Texas ASC Society directory confirms Dallas Endoscopy Center at 5327 N Central Expy is accredited by AAAHC. LinkedIn profile shows staff affiliation with IV Anesthesia Services.
notes: High performing rating for colonoscopy and endoscopy procedures per US News.

name: Carter Eye Center
services: LASIK, Cataract Surgery, General Ophthalmology, Presbyopia Treatment, Glaucoma, Retina, Dry Eye
evidence: No accreditation information for AAAHC, Joint Commission, or QUAD A found on facility website or in search results. No anesthesia partnership or staffing information identified.
notes: Found via web search. Located in Suite 300 at same address. Performs ophthalmology and eye surgery procedures including LASIK and cataract surgery.

name: University Hospital Outpatient Surgery Center
anesthesia_partner_name: Dr. Jayne Coleman - Associate Director of Anesthesiology
anesthesia_quote: She also serves as the Associate Director of Anesthesiology at the UT Southwestern Outpatient Surgery Center. You will be given the opportunity to discuss your anesthesia options prior to your procedure.
evidence: UT Southwestern's main hospital (William P. Clements Jr. University Hospital) is Joint Commission accredited, but no specific accreditation evidence was found for the Outpatient Surgery Center as a separate facility.
notes: UT Southwestern Medical Center facility. State-of-the-art outpatient surgery center on 2nd floor of Outpatient Building.
